title: An Act to Require Food Labels to Disclose Use of Messenger Ribonucleic Acid Vaccine Material in Food Production
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 13, 2025
last_house_action: 1/8/2025 - Committee on Agriculture, Conservation and Forestry suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/13/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
